items.title: Russians caught stealing personal data from Ukrainians with new advanced iPhone hacking tools
items.content: A suspected group of Russian government hackers was caught targeting Ukrainians with new iPhone hacking tools designed for espionage and potentially to steal crypto.

items.title: Apple rolls out first ‘background security’ update for iPhones, iPads, and Macs to fix Safari bug
items.content: Apple's first-ever "background security improvement" fixes a vulnerability in its Safari browser running its latest software.

items.title: MacBook Neo, AirPods Max 2, iPhone 17e, and everything else Apple announced this month
items.content: From a new iPhone to a budget-friendly MacBook, Apple announced a series of new products this week.

items.title: Apple acquires video editing software company MotionVFX
items.content: The move could help Apple better compete with Adobe Premiere Pro and the Adobe Creative Cloud suite.

items.title: Microsoft hires the team of Sequoia-backed AI collaboration platform, Cove
items.content: AI collaboration startup Cove is shutting down after its team joined Microsoft, with service ending April 1 and customer data set for deletion.

items.title: The billion-dollar infrastructure deals powering the AI boom
items.content: Here's everything we know about the biggest AI infrastructure projects, including major spending from Meta, Oracle, Microsoft, Google, and OpenAI.

items.title: The White House wants AI companies to cover rate hikes. Most have already said they would.
items.content: Many hyperscalers have already made public commitments to cover electricity cost increases.

items.title: The public opposition to AI infrastructure is heating up
items.content: Public backlash over the data center boom is leading to a variety of draconian policies — including bans on new construction.

items.title: Trump Renews Demand for Rate Cuts as Fed Grapples With War in Iran
items.content: Oil prices are soaring, threatening a wider problem with inflation, but the president has insisted that borrowing costs must be lowered.

items.title: Two Measures, Two Stories About Inflation
items.content: The Federal Reserve must contend with price readings that seem headed in opposite directions.

items.title: How to read the Fed’s projections like a pro.
What the Fed’s rate decision means for your finances
items.content: See how the central bank’s interest rate stance influences car loans, credit cards, mortgages, savings and student loans.
